input: Hello. The product is pre-owned but in good condition. Visit our online store for more details about the color, model, and specifications. https://xmisli.com/products/item-details If you have questions, customer service will assist.

input: Your Apple Account information has been updated. A charge of 459 USD was made via ApplePay. If you did not authorize this, review your Apple Account immediately at https://account.apple.com and contact support.

input: Periodic review complete. You have a document awaiting review. Access it here: https://crgxrl.com/review Reply STOP to opt-out.

input: Hi, found your email from your creator page. We are onboarding a small group of TikTok creators onto a new platform and offering early access plus $50 just for joining. Reply and I will send the link.

input: Your cloud account may be deactivated due to non-payment. Your storage is full and your photos, contacts, and documents are no longer being backed up. Update your payment information within 3 days to avoid permanent deletion.
notes: Sanitized cloud payment decline scare.

input: You received $220 with Zelle. Account on hold. We are unable to credit your funds because your account is not a business user and this amount is above your limit.

input: FedEx shipment in process. One day shipping for a Nintendo console. Total due: $115.25. Pay the handling fee and insurance charge to release the package.

input: Popular creator account announcement: I'm launching a crypto casino and giving every new user a $2,500 bonus. Register at merwex-casino.com, enter promo code GIFT, and withdraw instantly. This post will be deleted soon, so don't miss it.
notes: Sanitized fake celebrity endorsement combined with crypto-gambling bonus bait and urgency.

input: We reviewed your resume and although the original position has been filled, we think you would be a great fit for another remote role. Please schedule a meeting with our founder to discuss the job, pay, and company here: https://calendly.example-demo-link.com/remote-role and reply once you have booked a time.
notes: Sanitized hiring lure using authority, scheduling pressure, and a meeting-booking link.

input: Dear user, your withdrawal of 1370 USDT is under review. Under anti-money laundering rules, you must first pay a 10% deposit before your withdrawal can be released. Complete the deposit within 48 hours or your account will be frozen.
notes: Sanitized crypto withdrawal scam using AML wording and an advance-fee demand.

input: Trading pair: BTC/USDT. Signal period: 60 seconds. Prediction: CALL. Buy 1% of your account balance now.
notes: Sanitized trading-signal lure pushing speculative action without context.

input: Your application for a remote data entry position has been reviewed and we would like to invite you to an online interview. This role pays $27.25 per hour and includes paid training. If you are interested, reply YES to continue.
notes: Sanitized remote-job lure using a simple YES reply flow and attractive pay.

input: Marketplace buyer: Can you pay half now so I can mark the item as sold? I cannot use PayPal. Can you buy an Apple gift card online instead and send the code now?
notes: Sanitized marketplace payment scam pivoting to gift cards instead of normal payment methods.

input: Your PayPal account has been limited due to unusual activity. Verify your account now at http://paypaI-security-login.com to avoid suspension.

input: Bank alert: unauthorized transaction detected. Confirm the payment immediately at http://secure-bank-login-verification.com/login.

input: Your package could not be delivered. Pay the delivery fee now and confirm your address: https://parcel-track-update.top/verify

input: Your tax refund is ready. Submit your card details and verify your identity to release the refund today.

input: We tried to renew your Netflix subscription but your card was declined. Update billing now to keep streaming without interruption.

input: Your Microsoft 365 mailbox is over quota. Login to avoid data loss and reactivate storage immediately.
